name: The Gatherer
short_description: The Gatherer includes survival aspects, but focuses on a fun gliding experience and atmosphere. There are unlockable companions and some small dangers to look out for. As this is a solo side project by one Person that has never made a game before, expect some bugs and irregular updates.
detailed_description:
Hello everyone.

This game is a small survival project, mostly based on just vibing among the clouds with fun glider physics.
There is more to it, after all you'll have to eat to stay around and can also unlock some companions to help you with that, but the main content will remain island hopping with a fun glider.
Rebuild constructs of past travelers to overcome the challenge of survival on your friend, the skywhale.

As this is a solo side project by one Person that has never made a game before, expect some bugs and irregular updates. Planned future content includes an actual ending to the game and more creatures.

Hope you have fun.
